page.content: Table 1 presents the SPIDER Tool1 with headers including S, P of I, D/E/R, and various search terms. The row labeled S features the search terms (“rural” OR “regional”) AND (“population” OR “healthcare” OR “community”).

lines.text: Table 1 presents the SPIDER Tool1 with headers including S, P of I, D/E/R, and various search terms. The row labeled S
features the search terms (“rural” OR “regional”) AND (“population” OR “healthcare” OR “community”).

page.html:
SPIDER Tool1Search terms
S(“rural” OR “regional”) AND (“population” OR “healthcare” OR “community”)
P of I(“communit*” OR “consumer” OR “citizen”) AND (“participation” OR “engage*” OR
“involve*” OR “partner*” OR “collaborat*” OR “develop*”)
OR “cooperative behavio*” OR “stakeholder governance” OR “community network*” OR “community develop*” OR “social capital health services” OR “community-institutional relations” OR “community health planning” OR “health service*” OR “health planning”
D/E/R“qualitative” OR “quantitative” OR “mixed method*” OR “community participation action” OR “case study” OR “cohort study” OR “quality assurance”

cells.cell_text: OR “cooperative behavio*” OR “stakeholder governance” OR “community network*” OR “community develop*” OR “social capital health services” OR “community-institutional relations” OR “community health planning” OR “health service*” OR “health planning”
“qualitative” OR “quantitative” OR “mixed method*” OR “community participation action” OR “case study” OR “cohort study” OR “quality assurance”

page.content:
The P of I row contains the terms (“communit*” OR “consumer” OR “citizen”) AND (“participation” OR “engage*” OR “involve*” OR “partner*” OR “collaborat*” OR “develop*”). The next row lacks a specific label and includes terms such as OR “cooperative behavio*” OR “stakeholder governance” OR “community network*” OR “community develop*” OR “social capital health services” OR “community-institutional relations” OR “community health planning” OR “health service*” OR “health planning.” The D/E/R row incorporates the terms “qualitative” OR “quantitative” OR “mixed method*” OR “community participation action” OR “case study” OR “cohort study” OR “quality assurance.” 

Table 2 outlines protocols with headers Time, aConc.1, Conc.2, Conc.3, Conc.4, and Conc.5. The bDVI row provides values of 0 h, 0 %, 0-25 %, 25-50 %, 50-75 %, and 100 %. The next row shows a time of 1 h with concentrations of 0 %, 0 %, 0-25 %, 25-50 %, and 50-75 %. The 2 h row indicates concentrations of 0 %, 0 %, 0 %, 0-25 %, and 50 %. The cIVR row lists a time of 30 min and concentrations of 0 %, 0 %, 25-50 %, 50 %, and ≥75 %. The final row with 1 h shows concentrations of 0 %, 0 %, 0-25 %, 25-50 %, and 50-75 %.
